title: Horse Distance Limits
description: Route length is limited by the distance a horse can travel in a month. This creates a fundamental constraint on route size. Players must work within this limit or invest in ways to extend it.
definition-of-done: Route distance calculation based on road segments. Monthly horse travel limit enforced. Routes exceeding limit cannot be executed. Distance shown during route planning.
testing-plan: Verify distance calculation accuracy. Test limit enforcement prevents over-long routes. Verify distance display during planning.
todos: Build limit enforcement in route validation
Design distance display in planning UI
